Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

W

Weapon - Klasse in model.items.equipments
Represents a weapon item that can be equipped by the player.
Weapon(String, String, String, Itemtype, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.equipments.Weapon
Creates a new weapon item with the specified properties and damage value.
WEAPON - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.equipments.EquipmentSlot
Slot for weapons used in combat.
WEAPON - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.Itemtype
Offensive equipment used to deal damage (e.g., swords, bows).
WEST - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.dungeon.Direction
Represents the west direction.
